# Simone Cerruti — Bespoke Software Developer

> Independent software developer building bespoke, tailor-made software for businesses:
> management systems (gestionali), ERPs, CRMs, web platforms, SaaS, e-commerce, websites,
> PWAs and automation. Every product is built from scratch around the way your business
> actually works — never from templates. Based in Biella (Piedmont, Italy), working remotely
> with clients across Italy and worldwide.

I'm a freelance software developer and technical partner — not just a coder. I step into your
domain, understand how your business really works, and deliver solutions that are often better
than what you first imagined. After years in web agencies and then as a software developer and
Lead Developer on large-scale management systems, I now work independently, focused on quality,
reliability and bespoke solutions.

This website is fully bilingual: every page is available in both English and Italian.

## What I build

Everything is custom-built — tailor-made, never off-the-shelf:

- Management software / gestionali — the operational core that keeps a business running
- ERP — integrated systems for resources, processes and data, end to end
- CRM — managing customers, leads and relationships
- Web platforms & SaaS — scalable, multi-user products and subscription software
- Websites — fast, modern, accessible corporate and marketing sites
- E-commerce — online stores tailored to the way you sell
- PWA — installable, app-like web experiences
- Automation — removing repetitive manual work: reports, sync, documents, notifications
- AI-powered tools & AI-assisted development — AI as a precision tool, applied with judgment

## Why bespoke (su misura)

- No templates, no shortcuts, no "we adapt what we already have"
- Every project starts from a blank page and a conversation — your processes, your logic, your
  needs become the blueprint
- Software that fits you perfectly because it was designed exclusively for you
- Built to last and to scale: data structures that grow with your business, without rewrites
- Covered by automated tests, static analysis and monitoring — fewer bugs, fewer surprises
- Clean, intuitive interfaces your team learns in minutes, not weeks

## Expertise & stack

- Background: web agencies → software developer for management systems → Lead Developer →
  independent freelancer
- Large-scale, structured projects where performance, reliability and scalability are the foundation
- Core stack: PHP, Laravel, Livewire, Filament, Vue, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Docker
- Quality engineering: unit & end-to-end testing, static analysis, code coverage, mutation testing,
  error monitoring (Sentry), uptime monitoring (StatusCake)
- AI-assisted development as a deliberate, controlled part of the workflow

## Location & availability

- Based in Biella, Piedmont (Piemonte), Italy
- Works fully remotely with clients in Piedmont, across Italy and internationally
- Currently available for new projects
